allow: PowerShell($token = \(Get-Content "F:/WebDev Projects/RhinoMovie/rhinomovies/.env.local" | Where-Object { $_ -match "NEXT_PUBLIC_TMDB_TOKEN" } | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split "=", 2\)[1] }\); try { $result = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.themoviedb.org/3/trending/all/day?language=en-US" -Headers @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token"; Accept = "application/json" }; Write-Output "API OK - results count: $\($result.results.Count\)" } catch { Write-Output "API FAILED: $_" })

PowerShell($token = \(Get-Content "F:/WebDev Projects/RhinoMovie/rhinomovies/.env.local" | Where-Object { $_ -match "NEXT_PUBLIC_TMDB_TOKEN" } | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split "=", 2\)[1] }\); node -e "fetch\('https://api.themoviedb.org/3/trending/all/day?language=en-US', { headers: { accept: 'application/json', Authorization: 'Bearer ' + '$token' } }\).then\(r => r.json\(\)\).then\(d => console.log\('OK:', d.results?.length\)\).catch\(e => console.error\('ERROR:', e.message\)\)")

PowerShell($token = \(Get-Content "F:/WebDev Projects/RhinoMovie/rhinomovies/.env.local" | Where-Object { $_ -match "NEXT_PUBLIC_TMDB_TOKEN" } | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split "=", 2\)[1] }\); node -e "fetch\('https://api.themoviedb.org/3/trending/all/day?language=en-US', { headers: { accept: 'application/json', Authorization: 'Bearer ' + '$token' } }\).then\(r => r.json\(\)\).then\(d => console.log\('OK:', d.results?.length\)\).catch\(e => console.error\('ERROR:', e.cause?.message ?? e.message, e.cause ?? ''\)\)")
PowerShell(node -e "fetch\('https://httpbin.org/get'\).then\(r => r.json\(\)\).then\(d => console.log\('OK'\)\).catch\(e => console.error\('ERROR:', e.cause?.code ?? e.message\)\)")
